plt.savefig(str(OUT_DIR / 'f1_variants_all_experiments.png'), dpi=150); plt.show()

10c. Domain-dependent representation advantage¶

In [125]:
# ── Heatmap: which representation wins each metric × experiment? ───────────────
metric_names = ['Macro F1', 'Micro F1', 'Weighted F1', 'TWE ↓', 'MCE ↓']
metric_keys  = ['macro_f1', 'micro_f1', 'weighted_f1', 'twe', 'mce']
exp_labels   = ['SMT\u2192Beatles\n(pop)', 'SMT\u2192Schubert\n(classical)', 'SMT\u2192AllReal\n(pop+classical)', 'Mixed Holdout\n(cross-genre)']

# Build winner matrix as numeric (0=dc_pca6, 1=tz_deep, 2=dc, 3=tz)
rep_to_idx = {r: i for i, r in enumerate(focus_reps)}
winner_matrix = np.zeros((len(metric_keys), len(exp_dict)))

for j, exp_name in enumerate(exp_dict):
    for i, m in enumerate(metric_keys):
        if 'twe' in m or 'mce' in m:
            best = min(focus_reps, key=lambda r: all_exp_metrics[exp_name][r][m])
        else:
            best = max(focus_reps, key=lambda r: all_exp_metrics[exp_name][r][m])
        winner_matrix[i, j] = rep_to_idx[best]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))
cmap = plt.cm.colors.ListedColormap([ALL_COLORS[r] for r in focus_reps])
im = ax.imshow(winner_matrix, cmap=cmap, vmin=-0.5, vmax=len(focus_reps)-0.5, aspect='auto')

ax.set_xticks(range(len(exp_labels)))
ax.set_xticklabels(exp_labels, fontsize=10)
ax.set_yticks(range(len(metric_names)))
ax.set_yticklabels(metric_names, fontsize=10)

# Add text labels
short_names = {r: r.replace('deep_chroma_', 'dc_').replace('tonnetz', 'tz') for r in focus_reps}
for i in range(len(metric_keys)):
    for j in range(len(exp_dict)):
        rep = focus_reps[int(winner_matrix[i, j])]
        ax.text(j, i, short_names[rep], ha='center', va='center',
                fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# Legend
from matplotlib.patches import Patch
legend_handles = [Patch(facecolor=ALL_COLORS[r], label=f'CNN-{r}') for r in focus_reps]
ax.legend(handles=legend_handles, loc='upper left', bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 1),
          fontsize=8, frameon=True)

ax.set_title('Winner by Metric × Domain', fontweight='bold', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(str(OUT_DIR / 'winner_heatmap.png'), dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight'); plt.show()

print('Beatles: deep_chroma_pca6 sweeps all metrics')
print('Schubert/AllReal/Mixed: tonnetz variants dominate')
print('→ The optimal representation depends on harmonic complexity.')

Beatles: deep_chroma_pca6 sweeps all metrics
Schubert/AllReal/Mixed: tonnetz variants dominate
→ The optimal representation depends on harmonic complexity.

10d. Random projection stability check¶

Our single random-6 projection uses a fixed seed, it could be an unusually good or bad draw. To verify that Tonnetz and PCA genuinely outperform random projections, we run 20 random orthonormal projections on E1 (SMT→Beatles), E3 (SMT→Schubert), E7 (Mixed holdout)

In [126]:
# ── Random projection stability check — E1, E3, and E7 ────────────────────────
# Run 20 random orthonormal projections per experiment to verify that
# Tonnetz/PCA advantages aren't explained by a lucky random draw.
#
# E1 (Beatles): PCA wins, is PCA above the random distribution?
# E3 (Schubert): Tonnetz wins, is Tonnetz above the random distribution?
# E7 (Mixed holdout): Tonnetz_deep wins by wide margin, is it above random?

N_RANDOM = 20

experiments_to_check = {
    'E1: SMT\u2192Beatles':    (smt_data, beatles_data, None),
    'E3: SMT\u2192Schubert':   (smt_data, schubert_data, None),
    'E7: Mixed holdout':  (mixed_train_e7, mixed_test_e7, smt_val_e7),
}

rand_results = {}

for exp_name, (train_data, test_data, val_data) in experiments_to_check.items():
    print(f'\n{"="*60}')
    print(f'{exp_name}: Running {N_RANDOM} random projections...')
    print(f'{"="*60}')

    rand_f1s = {'chroma': [], 'deep_chroma': []}

    for trial in range(N_RANDOM):
        rng_trial = np.random.default_rng(trial * 7 + 1)

        for src in ['chroma', 'deep_chroma']:
            Q, _ = np.linalg.qr(rng_trial.standard_normal((12, 6)))

            N_tr, T, F = train_data[src].shape
            train_proj = (train_data[src].reshape(-1, F) @ Q).reshape(N_tr, T, 6).astype(np.float32)
            N_te = test_data[src].shape[0]
            test_proj = (test_data[src].reshape(-1, F) @ Q).reshape(N_te, T, 6).astype(np.float32)

            train_d = {'rand_proj': train_proj, 'labels': train_data['labels']}
            test_d  = {'rand_proj': test_proj,  'labels': test_data['labels']}

            # If val_data provided, project that too
            if val_data is not None:
                N_v = val_data[src].shape[0]
                val_proj = (val_data[src].reshape(-1, F) @ Q).reshape(N_v, T, 6).astype(np.float32)
                val_d = {'rand_proj': val_proj, 'labels': val_data['labels']}
                tl, vl = make_loaders(train_d, 'rand_proj', val_data=val_d)
            else:
                tl, vl = make_loaders(train_d, 'rand_proj')

            torch.manual_seed(SEED)
            model, _ = train_model('rand_proj', 6, tl, vl, epochs=EPOCHS)
            preds, targets = evaluate(model, make_test_loader(test_d, 'rand_proj'))
            f1 = f1_score(targets, preds, average='macro', zero_division=0)
            rand_f1s[src].append(f1)

        if (trial + 1) % 5 == 0:
            print(f'  Trial {trial+1}/{N_RANDOM} done')

    rand_results[exp_name] = rand_f1s

# ── Reference values ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ref_values = {
    'E1: SMT\u2192Beatles':    results,
    'E3: SMT\u2192Schubert':   exp_e3_res,
    'E7: Mixed holdout':  exp_e7_res,
}

# ── Visualization: 3x2 grid (experiment × chroma type) ───────────────────────
fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 2, figsize=(13, 11))

for row, (exp_name, rand_f1s) in enumerate(rand_results.items()):
    exp_res = ref_values[exp_name]

    for col, (src, src_label) in enumerate([('chroma', 'CQT Chroma'),
                                             ('deep_chroma', 'DeepChroma')]):
        ax = axes[row][col]
        tz_key  = 'tonnetz' if src == 'chroma' else 'tonnetz_deep'
        pca_key = 'chroma_pca6' if src == 'chroma' else 'deep_chroma_pca6'

        tz_f1  = exp_res[tz_key]['macro_f1']
        pca_f1 = exp_res[pca_key]['macro_f1']

        ax.hist(rand_f1s[src], bins=10, color='#BDC3C7', edgecolor='black',
                alpha=0.7, label=f'Random-6 (n={N_RANDOM})')
        ax.axvline(tz_f1, color=ALL_COLORS[tz_key], lw=2.5, ls='--',
                   label=f'Tonnetz ({tz_f1:.3f})')
        ax.axvline(pca_f1, color=ALL_COLORS[pca_key], lw=2.5, ls='-.',
                   label=f'PCA-6 ({pca_f1:.3f})')
        ax.axvspan(min(rand_f1s[src]), max(rand_f1s[src]),
                   alpha=0.1, color='grey')

        ax.set_xlabel('Macro F1')
        ax.set_ylabel('Count')
        ax.set_title(f'{exp_name}  |  {src_label} \u2192 6-D', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10)
        ax.legend(fontsize=7, loc='upper right')
        ax.grid(axis='y', alpha=0.3)

plt.suptitle(f'Random Projection Distribution ({N_RANDOM} trials) vs Tonnetz & PCA',
             fontweight='bold', fontsize=13)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(str(OUT_DIR / 'random_projection_stability.png'), dpi=150); plt.show()

# ── Summary table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print(f'\n{"="*100}')
print(f'RANDOM PROJECTION STABILITY SUMMARY')
print(f'{"="*100}')
print(f'{"Experiment":<22s} {"Chroma":<14s} {"Rand Mean":>10s} {"Rand Std":>10s} '
      f'{"Tonnetz":>10s} {"PCA-6":>10s} {"#Beat Tz":>10s} {"#Beat PCA":>10s}')
print('-'*100)

for exp_name, rand_f1s in rand_results.items():
    exp_res = ref_values[exp_name]
    for src in ['chroma', 'deep_chroma']:
        tz_key  = 'tonnetz' if src == 'chroma' else 'tonnetz_deep'
        pca_key = 'chroma_pca6' if src == 'chroma' else 'deep_chroma_pca6'
        tz_f1  = exp_res[tz_key]['macro_f1']
        pca_f1 = exp_res[pca_key]['macro_f1']
        r = rand_f1s[src]
        n_beat_tz  = sum(1 for f in r if f > tz_f1)
        n_beat_pca = sum(1 for f in r if f > pca_f1)
        print(f'{exp_name:<22s} {src:<14s} {np.mean(r):10.4f} {np.std(r):10.4f} '
              f'{tz_f1:10.4f} {pca_f1:10.4f} {n_beat_tz:>7d}/{N_RANDOM}  {n_beat_pca:>7d}/{N_RANDOM}')
    print()
